summary: DHH announces the release of TextMate 1.0.1, a Mac text editor he was involved with. The post is brief, quoting himself from the official release announcement. He thanks early adopters for enabling rapid iteration through nine beta versions. The tone is celebratory and grateful toward the community that supported the product's development.
key_points: TextMate 1.0.1 was released after nine beta iterations, showing a rapid development cycle
Early adopters' financial support and feedback were credited as essential to the fast iteration speed
DHH expresses genuine gratitude toward the user community for their trust in an early-stage product
money_quotes: I've always wanted to do this. So now I'm doing it. Quoting myself.
Your time and money are incredibly appreciated and your trust and belief in the product has made all the difference in the world.
key_insight: Early adopter trust and feedback can fuel an extraordinarily rapid product iteration cycle.
